candidates.name: contrastive-guidance
candidates.hypothesis: Explicit anti-patterns derived from prior failures will reduce regressions and improve decision quality

candidates.name: complexity-routing
candidates.hypothesis: Routing to different prompt complexity based on target file size reduces thrashing for large files and overhead for small files

candidates.name: tiered-context
candidates.hypothesis: Hierarchical tiered context structure with conditional inclusion improves relevance by only showing applicable guidance
